name: Prefab Portable Office
description:
Prefab Portable Office — Delivered as One Piece, Powered On Same Day

A prefab portable office arrives at your site as one complete unit — frame, walls, false ceiling, wiring, AC point, flooring, door, and partition already fitted inside our Bangalore factory. No assembly crew works on your property. The unit is placed, levelled, plugged in, and used the same day. This is the build method to choose when speed of setup matters most across our portable office cabin range.

How does a prefab portable office arrive on your site as one piece?

A prefab portable office is built complete inside the factory — frame, walls, roof, electricals, AC point, flooring, and door all fitted before dispatch. The finished unit is loaded onto a flatbed truck, transported to your site, lifted into position by crane or forklift, and powered on the same day it arrives. No on-site assembly. No module joining. No fit-out crew.

Single-piece delivery — the complete fitted unit transported from our Bangalore factory to the buyer's site by flatbed truck.

This is what separates prefab from modular. A modular office ships as components joined at site. A prefab portable office ships as one already-finished structure.

Single-piece sizes that travel by road as one finished unit

Single-piece delivery has a physical ceiling — the dimensions a flatbed truck can carry on Indian roads. Below 10 ft wide, transport is straightforward. Beyond 14 ft wide or 30 ft long, the unit ships as two or more modules joined at site, which is a different product.

Floor area Internal space Fits comfortably One-piece delivery
8 × 10 ft 80 sq ft 2 people Yes
10 × 12 ft 120 sq ft 3 people Yes
10 × 14 ft 140 sq ft 3–4 people Yes
10 × 20 ft 200 sq ft 5–6 people Yes
12 × 20 ft 240 sq ft 6–8 people Yes — permit needed
14 × 24 ft 336 sq ft 8–10 people Yes — permit needed
16 × 30 ft 480 sq ft up to 12 people Maximum size

For multi-room office space above 1,000 sq ft, larger multi-room office buildings ship as components for site erection — a different scale of product.

What arrives already fitted in your prefab portable office

The full office environment is in place before the truck reaches you. No electrician, AC technician, or fit-out crew on your end.

Standard fittings on every unit:

  • 40mm insulated sandwich panel walls — interior stays 8–10°C cooler than outside
  • False ceiling with integrated LED panels
  • 1 AC point with bracket and wiring complete — fit your AC unit and switch on
  • Vinyl flooring laid wall-to-wall
  • 1 steel-stud partition to your specified split point
  • 1 lockable steel door with weather seal
  • 2 aluminium windows with grills
  • 4 electrical points, tested switchboard with MCB

A completed unit at the dispatch bay of our Bangalore factory — fittings, electricals, and finishing all done before the truck arrives.

Network cabling, upgraded flooring, branded exterior, or extra partition rooms go into the factory order, not a site visit. Confirm at quote stage — price is fixed before manufacture begins.

From order to the day you sit down to work

The full timeline runs 8–12 working days for standard sizes; custom layouts add 3–5 days.

  • Day 1: Order confirmed, specifications signed off, 50% advance received
  • Days 2–7: Factory build at our Bangalore facility — frame, panels, ceiling, flooring, electricals, doors, windows
  • Day 8: Final fit-out check; balance payment; unit loaded onto flatbed transport
  • Days 9–11: Transit. South India destinations 1–3 days; Northern locations quoted separately
  • Day 12: Delivery, crane placement, levelling, power-on — your office is operational the same evening

Delivery day — a mobile crane lifts the prefab portable office from the flatbed and places it onto the prepared surface at the buyer's site.

You arrange two things: a flat, level surface for the unit and a 230V power point within 10 metres.

Three offices where single-piece delivery is the right call

Branch opening with a fixed launch date. A business expanding to a new city has marketing, hiring, and an opening event committed to a date. Site assembly introduces weather and crew variability. A prefab whole-unit converts the office build into a fixed transport date.

Audit or inspection deadline. A school group or factory facing a regulatory audit needs functional office space before the inspection. Single-piece delivery removes the on-site assembly variable.

Sites where on-site work disrupts operations. Yards in active commercial use, hilltop locations, or premises where additional construction would interrupt running operations all favour a single placement over multi-day assembly.

A prefab portable office in use as a working branch office inside an existing commercial compound.

What a complete fitted prefab portable office costs

Pricing covers the whole unit fitted as listed above — no separate line items for transport or installation.

  • 10 × 12 ft (3 people) — from Rs 3,50,000
  • 10 × 14 ft (3–4 people) — from Rs 4,10,000
  • 10 × 20 ft (5–6 people) — from Rs 5,60,000
  • 12 × 20 ft (6–8 people) — from Rs 6,80,000
  • 14 × 24 ft (8–10 people) — from Rs 8,50,000
  • 16 × 30 ft (up to 12 people) — price on request

Listed prices include delivery to Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, and the Greater Noida zone. Outstation quoted separately. Payment: 50% advance to start the build, 50% on delivery day.

When prefab whole-unit beats modular or readymade

Three build methods solve different problems. The difference is what happens between order confirmation and your first day of work.

Decision factor Prefab whole-unit Modular Readymade
Build status on arrival Fully finished Components shipped Finished from stock
Site work needed Placement + power-on 1–3 days assembly Placement + power-on
Time to operational use 8–12 working days 10–18 working days 3–5 working days
Best when Fixed date, custom build Team will keep growing Stock size, need it fast

A 12 × 20 ft prefab portable office installed at a school as an additional admin office — meeting an inspection-readiness deadline.

If your team will keep growing, a modular portable office adds rooms without replacing the whole structure. If a stock size suits you, our readymade office cabin ships pre-built. For an office that relocates between project sites, a different build method applies.

Frequently Asked Questions

How is a prefab portable office delivered to my site?

The complete fitted unit is loaded onto a flatbed truck at our Bangalore facility and transported to your site. A crane or large forklift lifts it onto your prepared placement area — no on-site fabrication or fit-out needed.

What's the largest prefab portable office that can be delivered as one piece on Indian roads?

16 ft wide by 30 ft long — 480 sq ft internal — is the maximum we deliver as a single piece. Larger units ship as modules joined at site, which is a different product type.

What does my site need before delivery day?

Two things: a flat, level surface with clear crane or forklift access, and a 230V power point within 10 metres of the placement spot. We handle levelling, fixing, and the power connection.

Can a prefab portable office be installed inside an existing yard or compound?

Yes, if your gate width and overhead clearance allow the unit to pass through. Most yard gates accept up to 10 ft wide. For wider units, confirm gate width at quote stage.

How does this differ from a modular or readymade office cabin?

A prefab portable office is built to order then delivered as one finished unit. A modular ships as components joined at site. A readymade is already built and dispatched from stock.

Tell us the size, location, and the day you want to start working.

We'll confirm whether your unit fits as one piece and quote the complete fitted price within 24 hours. Visit our Bangalore factory Monday through Saturday between 10 am and 5 pm.

Call or WhatsApp: +91 97089 89937
short_description:
Prefab Portable Office
Delivered Whole — Powered On Same Day
A complete, fitted portable office built in our Bangalore factory and delivered as one finished unit. Frame, walls, AC point, lighting, flooring, door, and partition all in place before the truck reaches your site.
Size
8×10 to 16×30 ft
Capacity
2 to 12 people
Frame
MS structural steel
Panel
40mm insulated PUF
Price
From Rs 3,50,000
Delivery
8–12 working days
Floor Load
150–200 kg/sqm
Relocations
3–4 over lifetime
Dispatched from Bangalore
WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
